title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・キーワード①

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With strides sharp enough to crack open sea
urchins, Gold Ship claims victory and receives the
first clue from Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not long after, Gold Ship and Tosen Jordan find
themselves embroiled in a fight over the last
remaining dessert at lunch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their fates are so intertwined that the two once
argued over how spicy chicken wing sauce should
be (at least, according to Gold Ship's memory).

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the general falsity of Gold Ship's claims,
they're enough to incite yet another argument.
Now, the two of them will settle things once and
for all on the track!
